decisions: STRUCTURAL DEVIATION from Plan 02-09 Task 1 plan text: implemented as UI-side useResolvedUserId resolver (Better-Auth fetch to /api/auth/get-session, credentials:'include') instead of the worker get-viewer handler the plan proposed. SDK pre-flight verification showed PluginContext has no caller-identity accessor (no users/user/session/identity); GetDataParams has no envelope-level userId; ctx.http.fetch is outbound Node fetch without browser cookies; UI cannot bootstrap a worker get-viewer call without already knowing userId (circular dependency). Plan's explicit escape hatch ('TBD by handler author'; 'STOP if neither path works') authorized. EXEMPT_HANDLER_KEYS unchanged (no new worker handler shipped). Documented in src/ui/primitives/use-resolved-user-id.ts header + 02-09-SUMMARY.md + 02-03b-API-SHAPES.md Finding #11.
next_action: Awaiting Eric's Countermoves COU-4 re-drill per 02-09-PLAN.md Task 4 <how-to-verify>.
